programme.title: El velo de novia: El viaje
programme.desc: Tracy y Nick acuerdan dejar de lado el trabajo para tener tiempo para una luna de miel en Grecia que se había retrasado mucho. Cuando terminan en una isla apartada, se enfrentan a sus elecciones de vida. Protagonizada por Alison Sweeney y Victor Webster.

programme.title: Amor A La Moda
programme.desc: Luego de años manejando la moda en la ciudad, Lauren decide mudarse a casa. A cambio de sus servicios de organización, Rob, el dueño de una compañía de mudanzas, se propone ayudarla a admirar la belleza de Seattle. Protagonizan Kat Graham y Kendrick Sampson

programme.title: Betty y su mala suerte en el amor
programme.desc: Con la mala suerte desde la infancia a fracasar en el romance, las relaciones de Betty siempre han terminado en desastre. Pero cuando conoce a Alex, se siente tentada a intentarlo una vez más. ¿Puede el amor verdadero prevalecer sobre una maldición? Protagonizada por Laci J. Mailey y Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: Navidad en Evergreen
programme.desc: Cuando cierran el aeropuerto por un temporal, una veterinaria se encuentra con un doctor y su hija. El resultado del encuentro les traerá a todos una Navidad mágica que jamás habrían soñado. Protagonizada por Ashley Williams y Teddy Sears.

programme.title: Un secreto de Navidad
programme.desc: Christine Eisley es una madre soltera con dos hijos que lucha por mantener a su familia a flote en Navidad. A medida que avanzan las Fiestas, descubre que sus dificultades se transforman en buena suerte.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Alejandra se encuentra con Eliza y esta reconoce a su amiga. Insiste en hablarle de Alondra y Sofía amenaza con llamar a la policía para escaparse.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.sub-title: Max da su apellido a Rodrigo
programme.desc: Eliza y Max dan un paso adelante en los trámites legales para unir a la familia. Pastrana borra parte del video que compromete a Julián en el accidente con Raquel. Lorena conoce a Sofía.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Alondra acepta mudarse con Ernesto y Julián. Piensa que solo así puede saber la verdad sobre sus padres. Ordenan la deportación de Raquel.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Conrado descubre a Érica y a Adán a punto de besarse, él le confiesa a Anastasia sus sentimientos. Paola se entera de cuál es el estado de Elizondo, José Carlos se acerca más a Gina.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Irene le paga a Bob para deshacerse de Erica, Anastasia le dice a su socio que se arrepentirá. Silvana le entrega a Ferrara una libreta secreta que dejó su padre en la caja fuerte.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.sub-title: Sara le confiesa todo a Salvador
programme.desc: Sara le confiesa a Salvador que todo es un plan. La Señora Acero le dice a su hijo que ella está con el Teca para atraparlo.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.sub-title: Manuel se acuesta con la Tuti
programme.desc: Manuel va a la cama con otra mujer por despecho, aunque no deja de pensar en Sara. Aldama y el productor musical hablan de su verdadero interés por Aracely. El Teca revela un secreto.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida: Hundido tras las rejas
programme.desc: Abelardo está en la cárcel y Marcela lo visita con un solo objetivo: que se ponga en su lugar, luego de todas las pistas halladas en su contra. Cabrera interroga a Salvador Terán.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Armando conoce a Reynaldo, el ex de Marlene, quien le advierte que se cuide de ella, pues en cualquier momento puede darle la estocada. Eva llega a tiempo para evitar que Luis actúe contra Soraya.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Eva consigue un nuevo aliado: Federica le presenta a su sobrino Reynaldo y se ponen de acuerdo para destruir a Marlene, quien sabe lo que le espera. Pablo se asombra al ver a Eva con un hombre.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Soraya recupera la memoria y pregunta por su esposo Pancho. Eva le dice que murió en un accidente y ella llora amargamente. Pablo va al hospital a buscar a Soler y le pide seguir como amigos.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Adriana se cae por las escaleras mecánicas de un centro comercial cuando huye de Andy y su madre la lleva al hospital. Marlene teme que la empresa de Eva crezca y le quite clientes a Monsol.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Fernanda hiere a Juan Marcos en el rostro y él le jura que nunca será suyo. El Verdugo descubre que Fabiola está embarazada de Miguel. Bernardo asume legalmente a la niña de Samantha y Willy.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Miguel sufre un infarto, pero se recupera y logra rescatar a Fabiola de las manos del Verdugo. Juan Marcos trata de ahorcar a Fernanda mientras tiene relaciones con ella.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Fabiola y Laura caen nuevamente en manos del Verdugo. Piden tres millones de dólares por el rescate de Juan Marcos y Ángela recibe la llamada.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana: Pedida de mentiritas

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: Deck Wars

The winner of this war is chosen by Decked Out's Paul Lafrance, who seeks the advice of construction expert, and host of Builder Boss, Jim Caruk.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: This is the ultimate of all ultimate Deck Wars! Decked Out's Paul Lafrance goes head-to-head against Leave it to Bryan's Bryan Baeumler. Two unbelievably awesome builders lay everything on the line to try and take home the Deck Wars trophy - and capture a lifetime's worth of bragging rights. Paul and his crack team from Decked Out are Team Black. Bryan and his great construction team are Team Red. The theme for this war is Freestyle - design and build whatever you want. Two totally awesome decks built in just two grueling days. The judges for this war are Income Property's Scott McGillivray, construction guru Damon Bennett, and Builder Boss' Jim Caruk. An epic battle for the ultimate victory.

programme.title: John Torode's Asia
programme.desc: Inspired by a breath-taking view of the skyline, John Torode begins his exploration of Hong Kong's modern cuisine with an introduction to Cha Chang Teng for breakfast where eastern and western cultures clash on a plate. After a hop across the harbour to the Peninsula hotel, John is introduced to maverick French chef Xavier Boyer, who influenced by Cha Chang Teng has carefully choreographed the most intricately balanced array of flavours in his own gastronomic style. There's even dry ice! But even Xavier's complex cooking isn't enough to satisfy John, who heads back across the water to meet local chef extraordinaire, Maureen, who cooks unusual cuts with molecular precision. After declaring her work revolutionary, John is driven to cook another Torode take on a Cantonese favourite: crispy pork. It proves so good, John only shares a small plate with the crew and keeps the rest of the wok for himself!

programme.title: John Torode's Asia
programme.desc: John Torode finds himself in the world's most densely populated region this week, The Las Vegas of Asia: Macao. As a former Portuguese colony, influences on Macanese cuisine come from all over the globe, and it's with this in mind that John finds himself baking and then tucking in to one of the spiciest dishes he's come across thus far: African Chicken. Within minutes he's crying “tears of culinary joy” for his host Florita's African taste sensation, something he certainly didn't expect to be sampling in a residential home on the south coast of China! Determined to continue his exploration of Macao's unique mix of culinary influences, John soon finds himself sampling a Portuguese custard tart. These are tarts with a difference however, since they were perfected by an English Lord (albeit in name only), baked with love by his daughter and using a recipe that will forever remain a trade secret. There's only one thing John can learn with any certainty here: the results are truly delicious. After a slightly botched attempt at butchery, John is shown how even the least tempting of cuts like Pig's ears can be transformed into a delicious and hearty stew by Portuguese chef Jose. Inspired by the flavours and methods he's been shown, John ends by giving us a class in how the humble prawn can be easily transformed into a show stopping dish for your guests.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: “Acqua Pazza” is Italian for “Crazy Water” a Neapolitan seafood favorite. Mary shows her students how to simmer fresh codfish over a tomato-based bed of sliced fennel, Castelvetrano olives, capers, garlic, and hot red pepper flakes. While that's cooking away in a covered skillet, Mary Ann and student Mary Ellen prepare shrimp-filled Seafood with Fregola. Enough to go crazy for, right?

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: In a matter of minutes, Mary Ann combines sliced chicken breasts with onions, garlic, and turmeric and into the oven it goes to create her husband's recipe Guy's Chicken with Olives and Turmeric. Then she makes another favorite, Meatballs Milan Style. Stuffed with filled with mortadella, beef, and ham and fried to a crunchy crisp, you'll want seconds, thirds, fourths!

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: One of the most up and coming food destinations in all of Mexico, Tijuana is full of young, fresh talent across the culinary scene. Some of the best chefs in the world are coming from all over and setting up shop to take part in Baja's most exciting culinary movement. Pati spends the day meeting up with the hottest new chefs in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Life on the border is a melting pot of cultures and cuisines that creates a unique culinary scene. As a Mexican immigrant in America, Pati spent her life combining cuisines. Influences from San Diego, southern Mexico, and all over the world come together as Pati dives deep to get the real story of what life and food are like on the border.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: The port town of Ensenada is a seafood mecca. Fresh fish is everywhere you look, and this hub for seafood exportation is also the gateway to Mexican wine country. Pati eats her way through this coastal gem from their famous fish tacos to La Guerrenese, considered the best street food on the planet, to the oldest bar in Baja and originator of the margarita, Hussongs.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Valle De Guadalupe, Pati visits one of the most legendary cooks in the area, Doña Esthela, who began with a humble burrito stand outside of her home. By word of mouth, her restaurant gained a reputation for one of the tastiest breakfasts in the world. Pati cooks with Doña Esthela and then takes the inspiration back home, where she whips up a Baja-style breakfast for her boys.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: With over 100 wineries, people are traveling from all over to experience Mexico's wine region in Valle de Guadalupe. Pati visits to learn the history of the region and find out what caused it to explode in popularity. She tastes wine and eats a top-notch meal at Bruma with Chef David Castro Hussong. Then, she catches up with old friends at Monte Xanic winery, one of the region's oldest wineries.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: One of Baja's most well-kept secrets has Pati on a mission to explore bite-by-bite. Loreto is a small town on the Gulf of California that almost feels like a step back in time. Pati visits the oldest mision in Baja California to learn about the town's history. She can't leave without trying a dish you can only get fresh in Baja — the indigenous almejas chocolatas or chocolate clams.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: La Paz: The Heart of Baja Sur
programme.desc: Pati explores La Paz, the capital of Baja Sur. She swims with whale sharks in the crystal clear waters of the Sea of Cortez, then satiates the appetite she worked up at El Bismarkcito, a seafood institution on La Paz's waterfront. She also stops to meet with Chef Carlos Valdez of Tatanka, a vivacious local chef with a sense of humor and some must-eat food.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits the small town of Miraflores with Edith Jimenez, a culinary icon in Los Cabos. At age 15, starting out as a waitress, Edith decided she would one day own the restaurant where she worked and is now living her dream. Owner of both Edith's Restaurant and The Office, she ensures the preservation of history and culture by consistently using recipes from locals in the area.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati sets out on the Sea of Cortez in search of the freshest, tastiest seafood Los Cabos has to offer. Along with Chef Guillermo Gomez of Cabo's luxurious Esperanza hotel, Pati reels in a fresh catch and heads back to the shore. Pati grills up her catch-of-the-day beachside with Chef Guillermo, as they discuss the evolution of Cabo San Lucas from small fishing village to vacation destination.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is invited to cook a Cinco de Mayo dinner at the prestigious James Beard House in New York. While in New York, she visits three Mexican-American culinary establishments around the city to hear the chefs' stories of using food as a way of pursuing their dreams in America, creating their own successful businesses, and honoring traditional Mexican recipes and ingredients.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Friends and family always tell Pati she has an extraordinary photographic food memory. She can recall a bite of a memorable dish from decades ago as if it were just yesterday. So, Pati decides to recreate some of her most favorite food memories in her own kitchen and give the stories behind the dishes.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon cooks his ultimate brunch dishes, including spicy pancakes, a simple frittata and a cheese soufflé.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon cooks delicious pork chops with sweet and sour peppers helps you keep your knives sharp.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Incompetent and Unfaithful
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league championship softball team. And finally, Froy and Sonia stumble into a bizarre love triangle when it turns out their car is owned by the sugar-daddy of a cheating spouse.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Jiro Dreams of Sushi
programme.desc: JIRO DREAMS OF SUSHI is the story of 85-year-old Jiro Ono, considered by many to be the world's greatest sushi chef. He is the proprietor of Sukiyabashi Jiro, a 10-seat, sushi-only restaurant inauspiciously located in a Tokyo subway station. Despite its humble appearances, it is the first restaurant of its kind to be awarded a prestigious three-star Michelin Guide rating. Directed by David Gelbb.

programme.title: XCLD: The Story of Cancel Culture
programme.desc: The notion of Cancel Culture, which grew out of a mostly progressive move to hold people accountable for bad behavior (especially racist or misogynistic language), has recently been co-opted by conservatives who–in equal measure–bemoan its “woke” goals, cast themselves as its victims, and attempt to use it themselves as a political powerplay, while seeking to deplatform opponents with similar strategies. But is Cancel Culture really new? Or really that powerful? Or really that bad? XCLD is a nuanced look at this provocative and controversial issue that explores the evolution of Cancel Culture, from its history in different forms, to its contemporary genesis on Black Twitter, to where it is today: another divisive issue for people to argue over, and one that creates some exceptionally odd bedfellows.

programme.title: Haiti On Fire

programme.title: From Russia With Lev
programme.desc: From Executive Producer Rachel Maddow and Director Billy Corben, "From Russia With Lev" reveals the outrageous scheme that led to former President Donald Trump's first impeachment. It follows the much, much larger-than-life journey of Lev Parnas, a Ukrainian-born hustler and former small-time mafia operator whose random, almost accidental association with Trump and Trump attorney Rudolph Giuliani took him around the world, and ultimately to prison. Lev reveals the ham-handed workings of the furtive campaign to dredge up false but damaging allegations against then-candidate Joe Biden. Directed by Billy Corben.

programme.title: Trump: The Criminal Conspiracy Case

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Vs DeSantis
programme.desc: In September 2022, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis used an undercover recruiter to lure 49 Venezuelan migrants onto the island of Martha's Vineyard with a false promise of jobs and housing — a stunt which fueled a political and media firestorm. “Martha's Vineyard v. DeSantis” tells this story through the personal lens of four migrant cousins who now live on the Vineyard, and the lead attorneys and Texas sheriff who are aggressively fighting back against DeSantis and his cronies.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: A graciously flowing four hour long pure nature relaxation experience, "A Day In Paradise" immerses viewers in the sights and sounds of one of the world's most pure and picturesque tropical islands - for an entire day from sunrise, to sunset. Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!
